case_title: VOZIKES 2017, LLC VS. WAYLON COLEMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239) AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET # 420 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239)
DECLARATION OF WALTER LIN IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $42.85 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71725239), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOZIKES 2017, LLC SERVED DEC-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, WAYLON
